description: Smart rules engine that actually filters questions intelligently.

designPrinciples.philosophy: Provide ONLY questions relevant to case profile. No question overload.
designPrinciples.baseQuestions: 13 essential questions always shown (Relationship Origin, Basic Case Info, Security, Travel)
designPrinciples.selectiveAdditions: Add more based on case characteristics.

selectionStrategy.approach: Layered filtering with true conditional logic

questionSelectionRules.name: Critical foundation - shown in ALL cases
questionSelectionRules.description: These questions establish basic relationship existence, authenticity proof, and immigration intent. Non-negotiable for every case.

actions.reason: Foundation category for all IR-1 spouse cases. Establishes relationship existence and identity verification. Mandatory.

questionSelectionRules.name: Relationship Timeline & Strength - shown when relationship under 2 years
questionSelectionRules.description: Recent relationships need more timeline-focused questions to establish authenticity. Longer relationships can skip some foundation questions.

actions.reason: Natural origin relationships need timeline proof to show organic development. Not needed for arranged marriages which are formalized differently.

questionSelectionRules.name: For arranged marriages - Family involvement & approval is critical proof
questionSelectionRules.description: Arranged/family marriages require explicit family documentation and approval evidence. This is the PROOF of legitimacy for this category.

actions.reason: Arranged marriages derive legitimacy from family involvement. Family approval IS the proof. Must emphasize family decision-making process.

questionSelectionRules.name: For natural meet relationships - Proposal & Wedding details are proof
questionSelectionRules.description: Non-arranged relationships need proposal and wedding details as primary proof of authenticity and commitment. This replaces family-as-proof in other contexts.

actions.reason: Natural meet (online, in-person, work/school) relationships prove authenticity through proposal and wedding commitment. Core evidence for non-arranged.

questionSelectionRules.name: Couples living together - show Daily/Household life details
questionSelectionRules.description: Cohabiting couples can provide specific daily routines and household integration evidence. This is credible, detailed evidence. Do NOT ask if long-distance - answers would be fabricated.

actions.reason: Living together couples provide authentic daily routine evidence. Specific household details validate relationship integration and legitimacy.

questionSelectionRules.name: Long-distance couples - focus on Communication consistency
questionSelectionRules.description: Long-distance couples' strongest evidence is daily communication maintaining the relationship despite distance. Focus on communication patterns and frequency.

actions.reason: Long-distance couples prove relationship maintenance through consistent communication. Communication frequency and methods become critical proof element.

questionSelectionRules.name: Employment & Finances - verify petitioner's ability to support
questionSelectionRules.description: Petitioner's employment and financial capacity is mandatory for Affidavit of Support approval. All cases need some employment/financial verification.

actions.reason: Petitioner employment and financial capacity required for visa approval and Affidavit of Support. Non-negotiable evidence of support ability.

questionSelectionRules.name: Intent & Future Plans - prove marriage is primary not immigration vehicle
questionSelectionRules.description: Immigration intent questions prove that THIS MARRIAGE is genuine primary purpose, not a backdoor to US entry. Critical for visa/green card approval.

actions.reason: Visa officers must confirm marriage is motive, not immigration is motive. Petitioner status (USC) makes this intent verification critical.

questionSelectionRules.name: Previous marriages - verify legitimate dissolution before current marriage
questionSelectionRules.description: Previous marriages MUST be legally dissolved. This is mandatory for validity of current marriage. Questions prove dissolution and time gap.

actions.reason: Previous marriages require dissolution proof (divorce decree, annulment, death cert). Questions establish legal validity of current marriage.

questionSelectionRules.name: Previous visa refusal - deep security & ties investigation required
questionSelectionRules.description: Visa refusal is RED FLAG. Requires detailed explanation of what changed + proof of commitment to compliance. Enhanced security screening triggered.

actions.reason: Visa refusal history requires demonstrable ties to home country, proof of changed circumstances, and commitment to temporary visit status.

questionSelectionRules.name: Overstay/Criminal history - maximum security scrutiny
questionSelectionRules.description: Overstay or criminal records are major red flags. Requires comprehensive security review and proof of rehabilitation/committment.

actions.reason: Overstay/criminal history = near-disqualifying. Must show comprehensive security background review and rehabilitation commitment.

questionSelectionRules.name: High daily communication - validates relationship maintenance
questionSelectionRules.description: Couples with daily/frequent communication patterns demonstrate active relationship maintenance. Strengthens authenticity claim.

actions.reason: Daily communication frequency is strong indicator of active relationship. Supports authenticity claims across all case types.

migrationNotes.v3.0_to_v3.1: Complete redesign with genuine conditional logic. Removed 6 rules with empty conditions that were causing 42-question overload. New rules have REAL conditions based on intake questionnaire.
